description_long: This is a traditional wooden rocking chair with a high, ladder-style backrest composed of three wide horizontal slats and two vertical posts that extend above the top slat. The seat is flat and appears to be cushioned with a dark fabric, providing comfort for the user. The chair features two armrests that are slightly curved and supported by vertical wooden posts. The base of the chair consists of two curved rockers, allowing for a gentle rocking motion. The wood has a dark, rich finish, giving the chair a classic and sturdy appearance. This type of chair is often found on porches, in parks, or in community gathering spaces.
description: A classic wooden rocking chair with a high ladder-back, cushioned seat, and curved rockers. It features armrests and a dark wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high ladder-back, cushioned seat, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved rocker base and the thickness of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ladder-back slats and the vertical posts extending above the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the armrest and the full curvature of the rocker.
